items.description: Vehicle recovery/follow up on I-80 eastbound between 2 miles east of Exit 64: PA 66 SOUTH - CLARION/NEW BETHLEHEM and 3.3 miles east of Exit 64: PA 66 SOUTH - CLARION/NEW BETHLEHEM. There is a lane restriction.
